story: One night a man crossed the linseed fields with a gas lamp and garden fork, following a faint buzzing into the woods and down to a gully. He tore off his clothes as he ran. Standing naked in the stream, he felt the hum swell through his bones. A flash came, and he vanished, leaving only his scattered clothes and a sloughed outer skin behind. Somewhere above the field, beyond the trees and stream, he traveled on. At dawn, his wife Nora found the trail he had left.
implausible_knowledge: Somewhere above the field, beyond the trees and stream, he traveled on.
question: After finding the discarded clothes and strange skin in the gully, what will Nora most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Stop organizing a local search and tell others he is already gone from the area.
answer_without_knowledge: Call for help and search the gully, stream, and nearby woods for him.
